mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces borrowing costs and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment rate below 5% signals tight labor market conditions that drive corporate profit growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 70%+ of instances where UNRATE declines > 0.5pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in housing starts (HOUST) and consumer confidence (RSAFS) signal weakening demand, creating a negative feedback loop that drives S&P 500 forward returns lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 50% of periods when both HOUST and RSAFS decline simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 100 signals robust manufacturing activity that correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO rises > 1.0pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) and stagnant federal funds rates signals central bank inaction, creating headwinds for equity markets that drive S&P 500 forward returns lower over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL rises > 0.3pp while FEDFUNDS < 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 200k signals strong employment growth that correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS rises > 200k over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in GDP growth (GDPC1) below 2% signals economic slowdown, creating negative momentum that drives S&P 500 forward returns lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where GDPC1 falls > 0.5pp over 1 quarter.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 105 signals overcapacity risks that create headwinds for equity markets, driving S&P 500 forward returns lower over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO rises > 1.5pp over 1 month.
